scriptText:
I. PART 1

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic musical short set in 1950s Batavia, featuring @actor1 as ROSA, a Javanese lounge singer, and @actor2 as MARK, a Dutch colonial clerk. Genre: romantic orchestral ballad. Tone: bittersweet longing on a theatrical production stage. No visible microphones.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Hold fixed stage geography: ROSA stage-left, MARK stage-right, eight meters apart on open wooden floor. Maintain the 180-degree axis through all cuts. Track bare feet, frangipani placement, and hand positions across every beat. ROSA's gaze stays camera-right toward MARK; MARK's gaze stays camera-left toward ROSA. Lyrics are diegetic performance — lip-sync must be precise. No dimming, no visual cue of ending; hold full light through the final frame.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Set: 1950s Batavia theatrical stage — painted sepia-teal Kali Besar backdrop, wooden proscenium floorboards, two amber upstage lanterns, black velvet wings framing the sides
- Score: solo piano intro swelling into warm strings with muted trumpet undertone, 1950s romantic orchestral ballad
- Lighting: hard key camera-left high angle creating chiaroscuro on ROSA; softer fill camera-right on MARK; long shadows stretching across the floor between them
- ROSA wardrobe (head to toe): burgundy velvet kebaya blouse with gold embroidery at collar and cuffs, fitted waist; floor-length batik sarong in indigo-rust with movement slit; low chignon, white frangipani behind left ear; gold hoop earrings; bare feet
- MARK wardrobe (head to toe): cream linen suit jacket unbuttoned over white dress shirt, open collar no tie; cream trousers with sharp crease; brown leather oxfords; dark hair slicked back, clean-shaven
- Atmosphere: orchestral score dominant, faint reverb of a large empty theater
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
Wide shot, slightly elevated, camera-right of axis. Painted colonial backdrop fills upstage, two amber lanterns glow center. ROSA stands stage-left in her burgundy kebaya, barefoot, body angled toward stage-right, hands clasped low. MARK stands stage-right in his cream suit, hands at his sides, facing camera-left. Eight meters of dark wooden floor between them. Both still. Warm key light rakes across ROSA; cooler fill touches MARK. Black wings frame both sides.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] WIDE, ELEVATED, LOCKOFF [AXIS] camera-right of axis -> [BLOCK] ROSA stage-left, MARK stage-right, facing each other across eight meters -> [ACT] Piano begins; ROSA lifts her chin, inhales; MARK's posture stiffens as he watches her from across the stage -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Solo piano: three resonant chords, warm reverb in empty theater
[CAM] MCU, CAMERA-LEFT OF AXIS, SLOW DOLLY IN -> [STATE IN] ROSA barefoot, frangipani behind left ear, body angled stage-right -> [ACT] She sings: "These lamps still cast your silhouette — (sustained note, warm vibrato)" — eyes fixed camera-right toward MARK, left hand rises slightly, open palm -> [STATE OUT] Tight MCU, glistening eyes reveal restrained ache -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Strings enter beneath her voice, lantern light flickers softly on her face
[CAM] MCU, CAMERA-RIGHT OF AXIS, LOCKOFF -> [ACT] MARK listens, ROSA OF — jaw tightens, swallows hard, eyes fixed camera-left toward her; hands curl at his sides, suppressed impulse to step forward -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Muted trumpet sustains one note beneath strings
[CAM] WIDE, LOWER ANGLE, LOCKOFF [AXIS] same opening axis -> [BLOCK] ROSA stage-left, MARK stage-right, still separated -> [ACT] She sings: "I've memorized the space you won't cross — (soft, falling)" — voice thins on last word, chin drops; MARK exhales, shoulders lower, he does not move -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Strings swell then thin to piano alone; final chord sustains, full light holds on both characters, still apart
[</BRIEF>]

II. PART 2

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic continuation of @VIDEO — the second half of a romantic musical short set in 1950s Batavia. @actor1 as MARK, a Dutch colonial clerk, sings his restrained reply to @actor2 as ROSA, a Javanese lounge singer. Genre: romantic orchestral ballad. Tone: restrained ache building to quiet emotional fracture, matching Part 1's pace. No visible microphones.
[[/INTENT]]
[[CONTINUITY]]
From @VIDEO final frame: ROSA holds stage-left in burgundy velvet kebaya and indigo-rust batik sarong, barefoot, frangipani behind left ear, body angled camera-right toward MARK. MARK holds stage-right in cream linen suit, white shirt open-collar, dark hair slicked back, facing camera-left toward ROSA. Both stand within individual circular spotlights on the wooden proscenium floor, approximately eight meters apart. Painted Kali Besar waterfront backdrop — colonial buildings, domed church, moored boats — fills upstage. Black velvet wings frame both sides. Shell-shaped footlights line the stage front. Preserve all wardrobe, styling, spatial geometry, and axis from @VIDEO through every beat. MARK's gaze stays camera-left toward ROSA; ROSA's gaze stays camera-right toward MARK.
[[/CONTINUITY]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] WIDE, LOCKOFF [AXIS] camera-right of axis, matching @VIDEO final frame -> [BLOCK] ROSA stage-left, MARK stage-right, both in spotlights, facing each other -> [ACT] Piano chord sustains from Part 1; MARK exhales, shoulders drop, lips part -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Piano chord sustains, faint reverb of empty theater
[CAM] MCU, CAMERA-RIGHT OF AXIS, SLOW DOLLY IN -> [STATE IN] MARK in cream suit, facing camera-left, hands at sides -> [ACT] He sings: "I hear you standing there — (quiet, steady vibrato)" — voice low and controlled, eyes locked camera-left toward ROSA, jaw tight with restraint -> [STATE OUT] Camera pushes to tight MCU, composure barely holding -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Strings enter softly beneath his voice
[CAM] MCU, CAMERA-LEFT OF AXIS, LOCKOFF -> [ACT] ROSA listens, MARK O.S. sustains last note — her breath catches, one hand rises involuntarily toward her chest then stops, eyes fixed camera-right -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Sustained note blends into warm strings
[CAM] MCU, CAMERA-RIGHT OF AXIS, LOCKOFF -> [ACT] MARK sings: "And every step I don't take — (breath)" — voice tightens, he breaks eye contact briefly, glancing down at the floor between them, then lifts his gaze back camera-left -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Muted trumpet enters, one low sustained note beneath strings
[CAM] CU, CAMERA-LEFT OF AXIS, SLOW PUSH IN -> [ACT] ROSA, MARK O.S. completes: "— costs me more than you know — (voice breaking, soft)" — her eyes glisten, chin trembles, a restrained exhale escapes, she holds her ground -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Strings swell briefly on "know," then thin to silence
[CAM] WIDE, LOWER ANGLE, LOCKOFF [AXIS] camera-right of axis -> [BLOCK] ROSA stage-left, MARK stage-right, both in spotlights, still separated -> [ACT] Both hold position, gaze locked across the stage; MARK's hands curl at his sides, ROSA's chin lifts a fraction; stillness -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Solo piano: one final resonant chord, full light holds on both characters, still apart
[</BRIEF>]
